title: Note - Heaven’s Reach Grand Elder
body:
After great deliberation with the underdwellers, we have decided to seal up these tombs and retract any record of their existence.

Far too long have we retained this devilish pact, allowing these subterranean demons to toy with the souls of our flock.

Henceforth we shall ensure our destitutes are unable to reach these horrible halls, at any cost.

The horrors of keeping souls alive while the flesh decays… this is necromancy.
